gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 focused review approved the project URL metadata slice with no merge-blocking findings. The review confirmed the PEP 621 Repository and Issues URLs are valid, covered by governance/public-package tests, and emitted into the built wheel metadata as Project-URL entries.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q -k "project_metadata_exposes_repository or project_metadata_uses_cachet_brand or public_package_name"
repository secret scan over README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, pyproject.toml, src, tests, databricks, pr-evidence, and .github
what_changed: Added PEP 621 project URLs for the document-kv-cache GitHub repository and issue tracker.
Added governance and public-package assertions that pin the published Repository and Issues URLs.
why: Open-source package metadata should point users from the published package to the canonical repository and issue tracker.
